name: Italian Beef Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Beef stew meat, cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in slow cooker on top of range or skillet
on medium heat.
2. Transfer pot to base or meat to slow cooker.
3. Add remaining ingredients except pasta to cooking pot.
4. Stir to combine. Cover and cook at Setting #3 for West Bend or low in others for 7 - 9 hours OR at #5 or high for 3 - 4 hours.
5. Increase heat to high (#5).
6. Add pasta and stir to blend. Cover and continue cooking for 30 minutes until pasta is done.
